claude-code-plugins.name: github
claude-code-plugins.description: GitHub MCP server — provides typed GitHub API tools (read PR diffs, post reviews, manage issues)

claude-code-plugins.name: pr-reviewer
claude-code-plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review plugin with specialized agents for code quality, security, test coverage, and performance analysis. Works with GitHub, Azure DevOps, Bitbucket, and any git repository.

prompt:
You are reviewing pull request #<pr-number> titled "<pr-title>" in the repository <repository-name> (branch: <pr-head-branch>).

Run /code-review to perform the automated review. The `gh` CLI is authenticated and available if you need it directly.
